articles.title: Man arrested for alleged assault of rideshare passenger at Logan Airport
articles.description:
The Lowell man is charged with assault and battery with a dangerous weapon causing serious bodily injury, State Police said.

The post Man arrested for alleged assault of rideshare passenger at Logan Airport appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Lowell man arrested for assaulting a rideshare passenger at Logan Airport.
Charged with assault and battery causing serious bodily injury, according to State Police.
Incident raises safety concerns for rideshare users at Boston's Logan Airport.

articles.title: WBZ meteorologist returns after taking 3 years away to care for her son with cancer
articles.description:
“I finally feel like I'm back at a place where I can sort of let him begin to thrive and let myself thrive.”

The post WBZ meteorologist returns after taking 3 years away to care for her son with cancer appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: WBZ meteorologist returns after a three-year hiatus to care for her son.
She expressed relief at being able to focus on both her son and her career.
Her return enhances local weather coverage for Boston residents.
